description: A friendly guide who introduces players to the Niftdood Metaverse and explains how Niftdood World works.
shoutMessages: Need help? Talk to me for a guide! 📚🎮
Curious about Niftdood World? Click me to learn! ✨🖱️
Press G to open the full guide book! 📖📚
Lost in the metaverse? I've got the map! 🗺️🧭
New here? Let me show you around! 🎉👋
networkOfflineMessages: Network down! No knowledge until connection restored! 🚫📡😭
Internet connection lost! Niftdood wisdom on hold! 😢🔌⏰
Offline mode: Mr. Gemx's wisdom disabled! ⏸️😴

welcome.text: Welcome, explorer! 🌍 Ready to dive into the amazing world of Niftdood?

sequence.text: Master the controls to navigate Niftdood World like a pro! 🎮✨

🖱️ DESKTOP CONTROLS:
• ⬅️➡️⬆️⬇️ Arrow Keys or WASD - Move your character around
• C Key - Interact with nearby NPCs (like me!)
• I Key - Open/Close Inventory (check your cool stuff!)
• R Key - Toggle Session Rewards Tracker (see your earnings!)
• G Key - Open/Close this Guide Book (your handy reference!)

📱 MOBILE CONTROLS:
• Virtual Joystick (bottom-left) - Move character (swipe to walk!)
• Interact Button (bottom-right) - Talk to NPCs (tap to chat!)
• Tap UI buttons for Inventory, Rewards, etc. (everything at your fingertips!)
Feeling like a control master now? Want to learn about our quirky NPCs and their fun quizzes?

options.text: Yes, tell me about the NPCs!

sequence.text: Meet the coolest characters in Niftdood World! Each one has their own specialty: 🤖✨

🧑‍🏫 MR. GEMX - Niftdood Metaverse Guide
• Explains the Niftdood Metaverse and Gemante NFTs
• Perfect starting point for new players (that's me!)
• Your friendly neighborhood guide! 🎉

👩‍🎨 NFT CYN - NFT & Blockchain Expert
• Teaches about NFTs, digital art, and blockchain
• Great for learning about digital ownership
• Artistic and tech-savvy! 🎨💻

🎯 HUNT BOY - Web3 Development Expert
• Teaches about Hunt Town developer community
• All about building awesome Web3 projects
• Loves a good coding challenge! 💻🚀
Ready to learn about those sweet Niftdood rewards?
Earn and manage your Niftdood tokens - the currency of knowledge! 💰✨

💎 EARNING NIFTDOODS:
• Answer quiz questions correctly (0.01-0.5 Niftdoods per question!)
• Complete challenges and explore new areas
• Participate in special events and activities
• The more you learn, the more you earn! 📚💰

📊 TRACKING YOUR PROGRESS:
• Session Rewards Tracker (🎯 button) shows current session earnings
• Balance display shows total accumulated Niftdoods
• Inventory system tracks your collected items
• Watch your wealth grow as you learn! 📈🎉
Want to learn about game controls or meet our awesome NPCs?

goodbye.text:
No worries, adventurer! I'll be here when you're ready to learn more! Press G anytime to open the full guide book! ✨📚
Happy exploring, and remember - knowledge is the best treasure! 🧠💎
